implBasis: 自建 plain block composite(消費 Button/ButtonDivider/layoutSpace)。驗證項:可見性判準 selection.length===0 && (totalSelected??0)===0 → null(tsx:90 = spec「Extend dataset pattern」反向選取例外)/ role=group + aria-label=ariaLabel??toolbarAriaLabel(tsx:98-99 = spec 2026-07-06 toolbar 降級 rationale,anatomy 同步)/ count span text-foreground font-medium tabular-nums + aria-live=polite aria-atomic(tsx:130 = spec Count text color canonical)/ hiddenByFilter>0 suffix text-fg-muted font-normal / clear X = Button variant=text size=md iconOnly dismiss(= spec Slot 表)/ px-loose py-tight + gap-2 + border-t border-divider + 無底色(= spec 視覺段)/ 自然高度 56/68 算式驗證(--field-height-md 32/36 uiSize.css:24,92 + --layout-space-tight 12/16)/ ButtonDivider mx-1(button-group.tsx:87)/ totalSelected number → count 顯示該值(tsx:132)/ labels deprecated toolbarAriaLabel fallback 一致 / hint banner 外包 Alert(role=status polite 與 alert.tsx info 分支一致)/ principles LinkTo(基本/提示擴選整個資料集)存在
